data.title: TLS Encryption
data.description: End-to-end TLS encryption ensures data security during transmission.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication
data.description: Enhances account security by requiring a second factor for authentication.
data.technical_spec: Integration with authentication apps and SMS for 2FA.

data.title: Bot Detection
data.description: Mitigates automated threats and spam through advanced bot detection algorithms.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models for behavioral analysis and CAPTCHA challenges.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular vulnerability assessments and patch management to address security flaws.
data.technical_spec: Use of automated scanning tools like Nessus and manual penetration testing.

data.title: Intrusion Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors and analyzes system activity to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Use of systems like Snort for real-time intrusion detection.
